events.title: Cultural Analytics series: Talk with Kyle Booten "Writing With and Beyond AI: Fieldnotes from Computer-Mediated Poetry"
events.description: A talk by Kyle Booten on computer-mediated poetry as part of the Cultural Analytics series, exploring the intersection of writing and AI.

events.title: Cultural Analytics series: Discussion with Kyle Booten
events.description: A discussion session following Kyle Booten's talk on computer-mediated poetry, co-hosted by the I School.

events.title: BETR/EECS Solid State Technologies Seminar: Prof. Sang-Hoon Bae, "Material Innovation Towards 3D Integrated AI Hardware"
events.location: Sutardja Dai Hall, Room 242, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar by Prof. Sang-Hoon Bae on material innovation for 3D integrated AI hardware.

events.title: Dissertation Talk: Quantum One-Time Programs
events.description: A dissertation talk on the topic of quantum one-time programs.

events.title: BETR/EECS Solid State Technologies Seminar: Prof. Mohammad Hafezi, "Topology Meets Nonlinear Optics: New Frontiers in Nanophotonic Devices"
events.location: Hogan Room, Cory Hall (room 521), UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar by Prof. Mohammad Hafezi on topology and nonlinear optics in nanophotonic devices.

events.title: Dissertation Talk: Understanding Models When Everything Is a Vibe
events.location: Berkeley Way West, 8th floor, UC Berkeley
events.description: A dissertation talk exploring new perspectives on understanding models.

events.title: Co-designing Learning Technologies: With whom? For whom? For what?
events.location: Hearst Memorial Mining Building 390, UC Berkeley
events.description: A talk discussing the co-design of learning technologies, focusing on collaboration and purpose.

events.title: EECS Colloquium | Can AI assist in Mathematics and Computer Science research?
events.location: 310 (Banatao Auditorium) - Sutardja Dai Hall, UC Berkeley
events.description: A colloquium exploring the potential role of AI in assisting research in mathematics and computer science.

events.title: Demography Brown Bag Seminar with Na'ama Shenhav: “Life-Cycle Effects of Women's Education on their Careers and Children”
events.description: A brown bag seminar discussing the life-cycle effects of women's education on careers and children.

events.title: Demography Brown Bag Seminar with Paige Park: “Deep Learning Approaches to Demographic Forecasting”
events.description: A brown bag seminar on deep learning approaches applied to demographic forecasting.

events.title: 12th Annual Workshop on Formal Demography
events.description: A weeklong workshop covering classic topics in formal demography, including analysis of fertility, mortality, and population dynamics.

events.description: A symposium by the California Law Review focusing on the intersection of surveillance, prices, and wages.
